race.comment: It's hard to knock the form of the well-related MANUKAU (2) (half to G2 winner Ohope) who has only missed a drum once in nine career efforts. Has a win and two seconds from three attempts over this sprint journey and should be right there when the whips are cracking. BRAVEHEART (1) also hails from a handy family (full to G2 winner King Of Sparta) and will be high on confidence following the last-start Ipswich victory. Sure to go well again. VEIN GIRL (3) resumes here but has revved up for this with two recent trials and gets some weight relief with the 3kg claim. Top-three conveyance while fresh. MISS MCLAREN (9) has put back-to-back wins together to start the career and has to be included in calculations. IMPACT ZONE (6) best of the rest.
